text.message: Wow, well the board just shrank with those first picks.
If ppl are gonna be asking Nb wood
I’m soloing you rest of game
But can I trade you for wood red?
Black is by far the best setup
can we let the game start before the tabletalk
i dont wanna do that but i will
I will solo rest of game
i need something to yearn for in this economy
You didn’t hamper black’s chances by that
I know..but had to try and match production
We need red to road here
Don’t know what red is doing
Red, you screwed it up by not taking road
Why do I find such dic k players
So called it from the start
